headline: ICLR Earnings Reset: What the Accounting Probe Changed
summary: ICON plc details an accounting restatement, flags control weaknesses, and frames 2026 as a reset year amid mix-driven earnings swings.

headline: The Bull Case For Thermo Fisher Scientific (TMO) Could Change Following AI-Enhanced Orbitrap Drug Discovery Launches – Learn Why
summary: In late May 2026, Thermo Fisher Scientific showcased its new Thermo Scientific Orbitrap Tribrid Apex and Orbitrap Excedion mass spectrometers at the ASMS Conference, highlighting faster, more sensitive multiomics and complex drug development analysis alongside AI-enabled software and its Olink proteomics platform. By pairing these Orbitrap systems with recent AI-focused software acquisitions and expanded bioanalytical labs in Sweden, Thermo Fisher is deepening its role across the entire drug...
